title: Luna's Kitchen — Mexican Takeout Restaurant Website Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Replace all Eatery Burns Lake branding with Luna's Kitchen Mexican street-food theme, apply warm vibrant color palette (deep red, orange, black, cream), update HTML title, and implement single-page layout with sticky header
acceptanceCriteria: All Eatery Burns Lake branding is removed
Color palette uses deep red, orange, black, and cream tones
HTML title reads 'Luna's Kitchen – Best Tacos in Los Lunas NM'
Sticky header shows Luna's Kitchen name/logo and a Call Now button

file_operations.description: Update HTML title to 'Luna's Kitchen – Best Tacos in Los Lunas NM' and remove all Eatery Burns Lake references

Replace Eatery Burns Lake color palette with Luna's Kitchen Mexican street-food theme colors: deep red, orange, black, and cream. Update CSS custom properties for primary, secondary, accent, and background colors using OKLCH values. Apply modern typography with Mexican-inspired accents.
Update Tailwind theme colors to match Luna's Kitchen brand palette (deep red, orange, black, cream) and configure Mexican-inspired font families

Remove all multi-page routing (menu, about, contact routes). Convert to single-page layout rendering only the Homepage component without TanStack Router route definitions. Keep RootLayout wrapper for Header and Footer.

Replace Eatery Burns Lake branding with Luna's Kitchen logo (frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-logo.dim_300x300.png). Remove all navigation links except the 'Call Now' button linking to tel:+15054884886. Apply sticky positioning and Luna's Kitchen brand colors.
Replace all Eatery Burns Lake content with Luna's Kitchen branding. Remove navigation links (no longer needed for single-page layout). This footer will be enhanced by REQ-21.
Remove MenuPage as the site is now single-page with no routing
Remove AboutPage as the site is now single-page with no routing
Remove ContactPage as the site is now single-page with no routing

requirements.summary: Build full-screen Hero section with generated hero background image, headline, subheadline, and three CTA buttons (Call Now, Get Directions, Order Takeout)
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section fills the full viewport height
Hero background image is displayed
Headline and subheadline text are correct
Call Now button triggers tel:+15054884886
Get Directions button links to Google Maps for the correct address
Order Takeout button is present and styled

file_operations.description: Build full-screen Hero section using the generated hero background image frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-hero-bg.dim_1440x800.jpg. Display headline 'Authentic Flavor. Fresh Ingredients. Made with Love.' and subheadline 'Los Lunas' Favorite Spot for Tacos, Burritos & Burgers.' Include three CTA buttons: 'Call Now' linking to tel:+15054884886, 'Get Directions' linking to https://maps.google.com/?q=3470+NM-47,+Los+Lunas,+NM+87031, and 'Order Takeout' (styled as future-ready placeholder). Apply Luna's Kitchen brand colors and ensure full viewport height coverage.
Replace existing Eatery Burns Lake Hero section with Luna's Kitchen Hero component. Import and render the updated Hero component at the top of the page.

requirements.summary: Build About section with story-style paragraph describing Luna's Kitchen as a locally loved Los Lunas takeout restaurant
acceptanceCriteria: About section is present on the page
Contains a story-style paragraph mentioning Luna's Kitchen, Los Lunas NM, bold flavors, fresh ingredients, and friendly service

file_operations.description: Build About section with heading 'Our Story'. Create a story-style paragraph describing Luna's Kitchen as a locally loved takeout restaurant in Los Lunas, New Mexico, known for bold authentic Mexican flavors, fresh daily ingredients, and warm friendly service. Mention it is a community favorite and go-to spot for tacos, burritos, and more. Apply Luna's Kitchen brand styling.
Add AboutUs component to Homepage after the Hero section. Import and render the updated AboutUs component.

requirements.summary: Build Featured Menu section with six food cards displaying generated food images and appetizing descriptions
acceptanceCriteria: Six food cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card shows a food image, item name, and appetizing description
All six items are present: Quesabirria Tacos, Tacos, Burritos, Quesadillas, Tacoburger, Burgers

file_operations.description: Build Featured Menu section with heading 'Featured Menu' or 'Our Favorites'. Display six food cards in a responsive grid using the generated images: frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-menu-quesabirria.dim_600x400.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-menu-tacos.dim_600x400.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-menu-burritos.dim_600x400.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-menu-quesadillas.dim_600x400.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-menu-tacoburger.dim_600x400.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-menu-burgers.dim_600x400.jpg. Include the following items with descriptions: (1) Quesabirria Tacos — 'Slow-braised beef birria, melty cheese, consommé dipping broth. A true Mexican classic.'; (2) Tacos — 'Seasoned meats, fresh cilantro, onion, and a squeeze of lime on warm tortillas.'; (3) Burritos — 'Stuffed with rice, beans, cheese, and your choice of protein. Big flavors, big portions.'; (4) Quesadillas — 'Golden, crispy tortillas filled with melted cheese and savory toppings.'; (5) Tacoburger — 'Where the taco meets the burger — bold, juicy, and totally unique to Luna's Kitchen.'; (6) Burgers — 'Handcrafted beef burgers with fresh toppings and house-made sauces.' Apply Luna's Kitchen brand styling with warm vibrant colors.
Add Menu component to Homepage after the About section. Import and render the updated Menu component.

requirements.summary: Build Why Choose Us section highlighting five key selling points with icons
acceptanceCriteria: Section heading 'Why Choose Us' or similar is present
All five highlights are displayed with icons
4.9 stars and 137 reviews are mentioned
Price range $10–20 is mentioned

file_operations.description: Build Why Choose Us section with five key highlights displayed with icons: ⭐ 4.9-star customer rating (137 reviews), 💲 Affordable pricing – $10–20 per person, 🚀 Fast takeout service, 🌿 Fresh ingredients used daily, and 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family-friendly atmosphere. Use a responsive grid layout and apply Luna's Kitchen brand colors.
Add Experience component to Homepage after the Menu section. Import and render the updated Experience component.

requirements.summary: Build Reviews section displaying three customer testimonials with names, star ratings, and review quotes
acceptanceCriteria: Reviews section is present with at least three testimonials
Each testimonial shows customer name, star rating, and review text
Reviews mention flavor, portions, and friendly service

file_operations.description: Create Reviews section displaying three customer testimonials. Each testimonial includes customer name, 5-star rating, and review quote: (1) 'Maria G.' — 'The quesabirria tacos are absolutely incredible! The consommé is so flavorful. Best Mexican food in Los Lunas by far!'; (2) 'James R.' — 'Huge portions, amazing prices. The burritos are stuffed to the brim and taste homemade. We come here every week!'; (3) 'Sofia L.' — 'Super friendly staff and the food is always fresh. The tacoburger is something you have to try — completely unique!' Use card layout with star icons and apply Luna's Kitchen brand styling.
Add Reviews component to Homepage after the Experience section. Import and render the new Reviews component.

requirements.summary: Build Location & Hours section with address, phone, business hours, and embedded Google Maps iframe
acceptanceCriteria: Address 3470 NM-47, Los Lunas, NM 87031 is displayed
Phone number is a clickable tel:+15054884886 link
Business hours show Opens at 9:00 AM with Closed now status
Google Maps iframe is embedded and visible

file_operations.description: Build Location & Hours section with heading 'Find Us'. Display address '📍 3470 NM-47, Los Lunas, NM 87031, United States', phone number '📞 +1 505-488-4886' as clickable tel:+15054884886 link, and business hours showing 'Opens at 9:00 AM' with 'Closed now' status indicator. Include embedded Google Maps iframe with src='https://maps.google.com/maps?q=3470+NM-47,+Los+Lunas,+NM+87031&output=embed'. Apply Luna's Kitchen brand styling.
Add Location component to Homepage after the Reviews section. Import and render the updated Location component.

requirements.summary: Build Call-to-Action Footer section with heading, CTA buttons, and main site footer with social links and copyright
acceptanceCriteria: CTA section heading 'Craving Authentic Mexican Flavor?' is present
Call Now button triggers tel:+15054884886
Get Directions button links to Google Maps
Footer includes Facebook and Instagram social icons
Copyright notice is present

file_operations.description: Build Call-to-Action Footer section with heading 'Craving Authentic Mexican Flavor?' and subtext 'Come visit us or call ahead for fast, fresh takeout.' Include two buttons: 'Call Now' linking to tel:+15054884886 and 'Get Directions' linking to https://maps.google.com/?q=3470+NM-47,+Los+Lunas,+NM+87031. Apply Luna's Kitchen brand styling with vibrant colors.

Update main site footer to include social media icon links (Facebook and Instagram with placeholder hrefs), copyright line '© 2024 Luna's Kitchen. All rights reserved.', and the address '3470 NM-47, Los Lunas, NM 87031' in small text. Remove navigation links. Apply Luna's Kitchen brand colors.
Add CallToAction component to Homepage after the Location section and before the Footer. Import and render the updated CallToAction component.

requirements.summary: Ensure all generated images are properly referenced as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated in the appropriate components
acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image is rendered in the Hero section
Each of the six food cards displays its corresponding image
Luna's Kitchen logo appears in the site header

file_operations.description: Verify that the hero background image frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-hero-bg.dim_1440x800.jpg is correctly referenced and rendered as the Hero section background

Verify that all six food card images are correctly referenced from frontend/public/assets/generated: lunas-menu-quesabirria.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-tacos.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-burritos.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-quesadillas.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-tacoburger.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-burgers.dim_600x400.jpg
Verify that the Luna's Kitchen logo frontend/public/assets/generated/lunas-logo.dim_300x300.png is correctly referenced and displayed in the site header
